LanguageData.HAR_OT_Incident_a.label: Container Crash
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Incident_a.letterText: Because of a battle in orbit, a Haos cargo container has fallen from the sky.\n\nDestroy it to recover whatever is inside.
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Incident_b.label: Haos Hunt
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Incident_b.letterText: {0} and {1} have started fighting nearby.\nThey appear to prioritize attacking the opposing faction.\nIf you keep your distance, they should retreat once the battle is decided.
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Incident_c.label: Courier Passing Through
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Incident_c.letterText: A Haos operative carrying valuable items is about to pass near your colony. Whether you let them go or seize the cargo is up to you.
